data.title: Horizon Minerals Ltd to Quote New Securities on ASX
data.description:
An update from Horizon Minerals Ltd ( (AU:HRZ) ) is now available.

Horizon Minerals Ltd has announced the application for the quotation of 101,296 fully paid ordinary securities on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), effective March 10, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its capital structure and potentially improve its market position, which could have implications for stakeholders by increasing the liquidity and visibility of its shares.

More about Horizon Minerals Ltd

Horizon Minerals Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources.

data.title: I-NET Corp. Achieves Seventh Consecutive Health and Productivity Certification
data.description:
I-Net Corporation ( (JP:9600) ) has provided an update.

I-NET Corp. has been recognized for the seventh consecutive year as a Health and Productivity Management Outstanding Organization in the Large-scale Corporate Division by the Ministry of Economy, Trade, and Industry. This certification highlights I-NET’s commitment to employee health through initiatives such as health seminars, mental health management exams, and promoting work-life balance. The company’s efforts have also been acknowledged with certifications like Eruboshi, Platinum Kurumin, and Hataraku Yell, underscoring its dedication to creating a workplace where employees can thrive and work with peace of mind.

More about I-Net Corporation

I-NET Corp. is based in Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture, and operates in the information processing services, system development services, and product sales industry. The company is focused on creating a supportive work environment that emphasizes employee health and wellbeing as a core component of its business strategy.

Current Market Cap: Yen30.56B

data.title: SPARX Group Recognized for Outstanding Health Management
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Sparx Group Co ( (JP:8739) ).

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. and its subsidiary, SPARX Asset Management Co., Ltd., have been recognized as Outstanding Health Management Organizations for 2025 in the SME category by the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry and the Nippon Kenko Kaigi. This certification highlights SPARX’s commitment to employee health through initiatives such as follow-up health interviews and workshops, aligning with its mission to create a healthier and happier workplace.

More about Sparx Group Co

SPARX Group Co., Ltd. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on asset management. The company offers investment management services and is committed to enhancing the wealth, health, and happiness of its stakeholders.

data.title: Guzman y Gomez Announces Change in Director’s Securities Interest
data.description:
Guzman y Gomez Ltd. ( (AU:GYG) ) has shared an update.

Guzman y Gomez Ltd. has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Thomas Cowan, who holds various direct and indirect interests in the company’s securities. The change involves a reduction of 772,944 ordinary shares over which TDM Growth Partners Pty Ltd, where Cowan has a significant interest, acts as a discretionary investment manager. This adjustment reflects a shift in management of these shares to direct client control, indicating a potential strategic move in the company’s asset management approach.

More about Guzman y Gomez Ltd.

data.title: Nexteq PLC Announces Share Buyback and Voting Rights Update
data.description:
Quixant ( (GB:NXQ) ) has issued an announcement.

Nexteq PLC, a company involved in financial transactions, announced the purchase of 30,000 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 69.00 pence each, to be held in treasury. This transaction adjusts the company’s issued share capital to 66,539,060 ordinary shares, with 6,424,398 shares held in treasury, resulting in total voting rights of 60,114,662. This change in voting rights is significant for shareholders as it affects the calculations for notifying changes in their interest in the company under regulatory guidelines.

More about Quixant

data.title: Capital Limited Announces FY 2024 Trading Update and CEO Resignation
data.description:
An update from Capital Drilling ( (GB:CAPD) ) is now available.

Capital Limited has announced a trading update for FY 2024, indicating an expected net profit after tax of $18-20 million, impacted by non-cash provisions related to VAT receivables and laboratory assets in Mali. The company anticipates FY 2025 revenue to be $300-320 million, with a focus on profitability in the USA and growth in MSALABS revenues. The resignation of CEO Peter Stokes has been announced, with Executive Chairman Jamie Boyton assuming interim responsibilities, as the company navigates profitability pressures and prepares for a recovery in 2026.

More about Capital Drilling

Capital Limited is a leading mining services company, primarily involved in drilling and mining operations. The company focuses on enhancing its core profitability, particularly in the USA, and is expanding its laboratory services through MSALABS, with strategic projects like the construction of a new laboratory at Nevada Gold Mines.

YTD Price Performance: -4.94%

Average Trading Volume: 223,348

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £151.1M
